case_title: OPOPRTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. WENDY L CHIRINOS RAMOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,424.69 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT CHIRINOS RAMOS, WENDY L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $55.00 SERVED DEC-14-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHIRINOS RAMOS, WENDY L
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO MAY-08-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS GOING TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM CHANGING PLAINTIFF'S NAME AND MAILING A COPY TO THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME BEFORE HEARING (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIRINOS RAMOS, WENDY L $1,424.69 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,509.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
